rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no bearing on §11.19, which governs exemptions for youth development associations. The two sections address entirely separate exemption categories with no cross-references or interdependencies.
quote: Sec. 11.19. YOUTH SPIRITUAL, MENTAL, AND PHYSICAL DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATIONS.
_note: Rule text is §11.19 (youth development associations), unrelated to the proposed change targeting §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption). No conflict exists.
